issues.comment: Incomplete double-checked locking pattern: after acquiring the exclusive write lock, the code fails to re-check whether `entryPointAssetsCache` has already been populated by another goroutine. Multiple goroutines that passed the initial RLock check while cache was nil will queue on the Lock and each redundantly re-read the file, re-evaluate feature flags, and overwrite the cache. A re-check `if cfg.Env != setting.Dev && entryPointAssetsCache != nil { return entryPointAssetsCache, nil }` should be added immediately after acquiring the write lock.
